query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `metas_globais` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `mes` int NOT NULL,
  `ano` int NOT NULL,
  `metaVGV` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `observacoes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `metas_globais_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `metas_globais_mes_ano_idx` (`mes`, `ano`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `metas_globais` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `mes` int NOT NULL,
  `ano` int NOT NULL,
  `metaVGV` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `observacoes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
